title: Client Builders Wand
description: Allows Building like you have a builders wand
body: If you need a server, check out our partner Kinetic Hosting:  Allows Building like you have a builders wand Different Settings via ingame Menu: - **Fuzzy Mode** - If on, it ignores the pattern of blocks below - **Replace Fluids** - Places Blocks inside Fluids (Water and Lava) - **Replace Plants** - Replaces Plants that can be replaced, like grass - **Place in air** - ignores if air is below the placements surface(requires Fuzzy mode to be on, because air ist different block then the block you placed against.) **This mod may be considered as cheating or boting on some servers, so don't use it, if it is not allowed and don't blame me for use it against server rules!** Some servers may block the mods or block it server-side, so that ghost blocks may occur.
